headings.text: Dental Checkup at AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, Bellevue, WA
Why Regular Dental Checkups Are Essential
What to Expect During Your Dental Checkup
The Role of Technology in Modern Checkups
How Often You Should Schedule a Dental Checkup for Optimal Care

paragraphs: Regular dental checkups are the most effective way to maintain healthy teeth and gums and prevent oral health problems before they begin. Even if your teeth seem fine, issues like cavities or gum disease can develop without any initial symptoms.

At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we focus on providing thorough, preventive care to protect your smile for the long term. Our team is here to ensure you feel comfortable and informed every step of the way.

Preventive care is key to avoiding more complex and costly treatments down the road. Waiting until you feel pain often means a problem has already become advanced. Regular checkups are designed to catch dental issues when they are small and easier to manage, helping to save you time and money.

These visits do more than just fix problems; they are an opportunity to keep your teeth strong and your gums healthy. Your dental team can provide personalized tips on effective brushing and flossing techniques, as well as advice on foods that help protect your teeth. Consistent checkups are a simple investment in your oral health that prevents small issues from turning into major concerns.
A routine dental checkup is a straightforward and typically painless process that takes less than an hour. Knowing what will happen can help make your visit stress-free.
Your appointment will generally include:
At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we use advanced technology to make your checkup more accurate, comfortable, and efficient. These tools help us detect problems at their earliest stages.

For most people, visiting the dentist every six months is recommended for optimal oral health. This frequency allows us to keep your teeth clean and identify any potential issues early. However, some individuals may need more frequent visits, including children, older adults, or those with extensive dental work. If you ever experience symptoms like tooth pain or bleeding gums, you should schedule an appointment right away.
Clara H. Song, DDS

Dr. Clara Song, the founder of AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, provides gentle and welcoming dental care to patients in Bellevue and Kirkland. After earning her Doctor of Dental Surgery from Loma Linda University, she completed advanced training at the prestigious Las Vegas Institute for Advanced Dental Studies. Dr. Song moved to Bellevue in 2007 to establish a practice centered on a friendly environment and compassionate care.

Dr. Eric Kim earned his dental degree from Loma Linda University after studying General Biology at the University of Washington. He is dedicated to providing high-quality, gentle care and stays current with the latest advancements in dentistry. Dr. Kim shares Dr. Song’s commitment to excellent treatment and patient comfort.
We are committed to helping you receive the dental care you need, with or without insurance. Our office accepts a variety of payment options:
We also work with many insurance providers. Please call our office to learn more about your payment and insurance options.
Schedule Your Checkup Today
Regular dental visits are essential for a lifetime of healthy smiles. Contact us to schedule your next appointment.

AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry
11216 NE 15th St Suite A
Bellevue WA 98004
(425) 454-3221
